registration.title: Become a Seller
registration.subtitle: Create your professional shop on Nunulia.
registration.noMarketRequired: For {{country}}, a physical market is not required. Your shop will be visible in the {{country}} section.
registration.gpsHint: Enable location on your phone. Essential for customers to find you.
registration.hasNifQuestion: Do you have a Tax ID (NIF)?
registration.nifExplanation: Without a Tax ID, you are restricted to the free plan. With a Tax ID, you can subscribe to Pro plans.
registration.termsAccept: I certify the accuracy of the information. Nunulia reserves the right to suspend any fraudulent account.
registration.termsRequired: Please accept the terms and conditions.
registration.securityFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
registration.gpsRequired: GPS location is mandatory for a fixed shop.
registration.gpsNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
registration.gpsNeedsHttps: Geolocation requires a secure HTTPS connection.
registration.gpsErrorDenied: Location access denied. Go to your browser settings → Site permissions → Location → Allow.
registration.gpsErrorUnavailable: Position unavailable. Make sure GPS is enabled on your device and try again.
registration.gpsErrorTimeout: Timeout. Go outside for a better GPS signal and try again.

planGate.title: Available for Business Pro sellers and above
planGate.subtitle: Upgrade to Business Pro to access WhatsApp numbers and contact buyers.

verification.tierIdentityDesc: ID documents reviewed by our team.
verification.tierShopDesc: A Nunulia agent visited the shop to confirm the business.
verification.modalSubtitle: Your verification request has been sent to our team.
verification.modalStep1Desc: We check your NIF / Registry numbers and details within 48–72h.
verification.modalStep2Desc: A team member may call you to confirm the details.
verification.modalStep3Desc: For Shop verified level, an agent may visit your shop.
verification.modalTrust: Verified sellers earn buyer trust and increase their sales.

trust.title: Trust score
trust.disclaimer: Score computed from seniority, activity, verification and subscription of the seller.

unverifiedSeller.banner: This seller has not been verified by our team yet. Check our safety tips before buying.

becomeSellerLanding.heroSubtitle: Open your shop in 2 minutes. Reach thousands of buyers in Burundi, DRC and Rwanda. Get paid directly via WhatsApp and Mobile Money.
becomeSellerLanding.step1Desc: Create your shop in 2 minutes with your WhatsApp number.
becomeSellerLanding.step2Desc: Photos, price, description — your listings go live instantly.
becomeSellerLanding.step3Desc: Buyers reach you on WhatsApp. You handle the deal and the payment directly.
becomeSellerLanding.foundersDesc: For the first 100 sellers joining NUNULIA. No commitment, full Business Pro access for 90 days.
becomeSellerLanding.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
becomeSellerLanding.whySubtitle: The marketplace built for East African sellers.
becomeSellerLanding.whyLocalDesc: Built for Burundi, DRC and Rwanda. Local currencies, languages and habits.
becomeSellerLanding.whyWhatsAppDesc: Customers reach you on WhatsApp. Chat, deliver and get paid on your terms.
becomeSellerLanding.whyMomoDesc: Lumicash, Airtel Money, MTN MoMo, M-Pesa. Pay your plan in a few taps.
becomeSellerLanding.whyZeroFeeDesc: Keep 100% of your sales. You only pay a monthly subscription.
becomeSellerLanding.whyMobileFirstDesc: Fast even on 3G. Built for entry-level smartphones.
becomeSellerLanding.whyVerifiedDesc: Earn buyer trust with an official NUNULIA verified badge.
becomeSellerLanding.finalCTASubtitle: Free signup. Your first 5 listings are on us.
